title: curioSprout Interactive Alphabet Activity Book | Montessori Busy Book
description: Interactive Montessori alphabet activity book designed for toddlers aged 2–5 years. Includes ABC writing practice, letter recognition, matching activities, and reusable velcro-based learning pages. Ideal for travel and quiet learning time.

title: Btag Kids Premium Plush Bunny Earmuffs with Moving Ears
description: Ultra-soft premium plush bunny earmuffs designed for kids. Features animated moving ears when pressed, providing warmth, comfort, and playful fun. Ideal for winter wear, outdoor activities, and gifting.
features: Cute design ideal for winter outfits

title: SEMITO Winter Gloves for Men & Women – Thermal Windproof Touch Screen Gloves
description: SEMITO thermal winter gloves designed to keep hands warm, dry, and comfortable in cold weather. These windproof gloves feature touch screen compatible fingers, anti-slip palm grip, and water-resistant fabric, making them ideal for biking, cycling, skiing, and daily winter use.

title: Matrix Black & Blue Analog Stainless Steel Watch with Day & Date
description: Stylish Matrix analog wrist watch featuring a black and blue dial with day and date display. Built with a durable stainless steel strap and quartz movement, making it suitable for daily wear as well as formal occasions for both men and women.
features: Analog display with day and date function
Ideal for daily and formal wear

title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 5G with Galaxy AI (Titanium Whitesilver, 12GB RAM, 256GB Storage)
description: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 5G powered by Snapdragon 8 Elite processor and Galaxy AI. Features a premium titanium design, 200MP camera with ProVisual Engine, immersive AMOLED display, and a massive 5000mAh battery for all-day performance.

title: ZORO Men’s Nylon Fabric Belt for Men, Plastic Flap Buckle (Fits up to 40 Inches Waist)
description: ZORO men’s nylon fabric belt with a lightweight plastic flap buckle. Durable, adjustable, and comfortable for everyday wear. Suitable for casual, formal, and business use. Fits waist sizes up to 40 inches.

title: Men’s 2 Inch Heel Height Increasing Patent Leather Ankle Boot (Casual & Formal Slip-On)
build_material: Faux Leather Upper with Polyurethane Sole
description: Men’s lightweight ankle boot with a built-in 2-inch heel for height increase. Designed with a slip-on style, faux leather upper, and durable polyurethane sole. Suitable for casual, formal, and party wear.

title: Ambrane 20000mAh Powerbank with In-Build Type-C Cable, 22.5W Fast Charging & USB Output
description: Ambrane Stylo N20 20000mAh powerbank with in-built Type-C cable supports 22.5W fast charging and dual output ports. Ideal for charging smartphones, tablets, earbuds, and other USB-powered devices. Compact design with advanced safety protection.

title: Lymio Jackets for Men | Lightweight Outdoor Jacket (JT-07-09)
description: Lymio lightweight outdoor jacket for men designed for casual and sporty wear. Made from durable polyester fabric with a regular fit and standard length. Suitable for daily use, travel, and mild outdoor activities.

title: TAGAS Men's Regular Fit Zip-Up Casual Bomber Jacket for Men (MJ-9090)
description: TAGAS men's regular-fit zip-up bomber jacket designed for casual and winter wear. Features a stylish ribbed collar, smooth zipper closure, and durable polyester-cotton blend fabric. Suitable for daily wear and light winter conditions.

title: Lifelong FitPro Motorized Treadmill for Home (4HP Peak, 3-Level Manual Incline, 14km/h)
build_material: Steel Frame with Rubber Shock Absorption Belt
description: Lifelong FitPro motorized treadmill designed for home workouts. Powered by a 4HP peak motor with a top speed of 14 km/h, 3-level manual incline, shock absorption system, and foldable hydraulic design. Includes 12 preset workout programs and Bluetooth connectivity for enhanced training.

title: Sparnod Fitness Silicone Spray for Treadmill Lubrication (Easy to Use, 550 ml)
description: Sparnod Fitness silicone spray lubricant specially designed for treadmills and fitness equipment. Reduces friction, noise, and wear, helping extend belt and motor life. Easy spray application, suitable for home and commercial treadmills.

title: Leader Beast 26T IBC Pro Cycle with Inbuilt Carrier, Single Speed Cycle for Men
description: Leader Beast 26T IBC Pro single-speed cycle designed for men. Features a strong rigid steel frame, inbuilt carrier, front suspension, and powerful brakes. Ideal for daily commuting, fitness riding, and city use for riders aged 10+.

title: Link Heavy Duty Steel Cable Lock – 100cm Length, 7mm Thickness, Key Lock with 2 Keys
description: Heavy-duty steel cable lock with 7mm thick alloy steel cable and 100cm length. Designed to secure bikes, cycles, helmets, scooters, and gates. Comes with a durable key lock mechanism and 2 keys for added security.

title: Strauss Bicycle Air Pump with Needle & Dual Valve | 30 CM Portable Pump
description: Strauss portable bicycle air pump with dual valve support and inflation needle. Designed for inflating bicycle tires, swimming rings, footballs, and other inflatables. Lightweight, sturdy base with an ergonomic T-handle for comfortable pumping.

title: PRO365 Premium Bicycle Rear View Mirror with Protective Film | Adjustable 360° Handlebar Convex Mirror (Pack of 2)
description: PRO365 premium bicycle rear view mirrors designed to provide a wide-angle view for safer riding. Features convex mirrors with protective film, adjustable 360-degree rotation, and sturdy handlebar mounting. Suitable for road, mountain, and commuter bicycles.

title: LETTURE Bicycle Rear Light with 4 Lighting Modes, USB Rechargeable Ultra Bright Red LED
description: LETTURE ultra-bright bicycle rear light designed to improve visibility and safety during night and low-light rides. Features 4 lighting modes, USB rechargeable battery, lightweight waterproof design, and easy installation. Suitable for bicycles, helmets, and scooters.

title: Gadget Deals High Visibility Protective Night Cycling Reflector Vest | Adjustable Safety Jacket
description: High-visibility reflective safety vest designed for night cycling and outdoor activities. Features bright reflective strips, adjustable straps for a secure fit, and lightweight breathable design. Ideal for cyclists, runners, and night commuters.

title: Milton Rapid Electric Kettle | 1500 Watts | Stainless Steel Hot Water Kettle with Auto Shut-Off
description: Milton Rapid electric kettle with 1500W power and 1.8L capacity, designed for quick boiling. Features stainless steel body, automatic shut-off, single-touch lid lock, and cool-touch handle. Ideal for home and office use.

title: Milton Duo DLX 1000 Thermosteel Bottle | 1000 ml | 24 Hours Hot & Cold | Matte Blue
description: Milton Duo DLX 1000 thermosteel bottle with 1000 ml capacity, designed to keep beverages hot or cold for up to 24 hours. Features easy grip design, rust-proof stainless steel body, leakproof lid, and premium matte finish. Ideal for travel, office, gym, and outdoor activities.

title: Milton Aura 1000 Thermosteel Water Bottle | 1000 ml | 24 Hour Hot & Cold | Leak Proof Lid
description: Milton Aura 1000 thermosteel water bottle with 1000 ml capacity, designed to keep beverages hot or cold for up to 24 hours. Features double-wall vacuum insulation, leakproof lid, rust-resistant SS 304 stainless steel body, and a sleek matte black finish. Ideal for office, gym, travel, and daily use.

title: NutriPro Juicer Mixer Grinder – Smoothie Maker | 500 Watts | 2 Jars & 1 Blade (Silver)
description: NutriPro 500W juicer mixer grinder designed for quick blending, grinding, and smoothie preparation. Comes with 2 jars and a powerful motor for efficient performance. Ideal for making juices, smoothies, chutneys, and dry/wet grinding. Includes 2-year warranty for peace of mind.

title: 1st Step Portable Grinder & Masher/Serving Bowl for Baby Food Preparation with Spoon (Pack of 1)
description: 1st Step portable grinder and masher bowl designed for easy baby food preparation. Comes with a spoon and ergonomic handle for firm grip while grinding. BPA-free, lightweight, and ideal for preparing fresh fruits and vegetables at home or on the go.

title: The Psychology of Money: Timeless Lessons on Wealth, Greed, and Happiness (Paperback)
description: The Psychology of Money by Morgan Housel explores timeless lessons on how people think about money. Through short stories and real-world examples, the book explains the emotional and psychological factors behind financial success, investing, and decision-making.

title: Dopamine Detox: A Short Guide to Remove Distractions and Get Your Brain to Do Hard Things (Paperback)
description: Dopamine Detox by Thibaut Meurisse is a practical guide to breaking addictive behaviors and eliminating distractions. The book explains how dopamine affects motivation and focus, and provides simple strategies to reset your brain, build discipline, and regain control over your habits and productivity.

title: Do It Today: Overcome Procrastination, Improve Productivity and Achieve More Meaningful Things in Life (Paperback)
description: Do It Today by Darius Foroux is a practical guide to overcoming procrastination and taking immediate action. The book focuses on building discipline, eliminating excuses, and creating habits that help you achieve meaningful goals by doing what matters now.

title: You Can | The Classic Guide to Self-Belief, Self-Help, Motivation and Personal Growth (Paperback)
description: You Can by George Matthew Adams is a timeless self-help classic that focuses on building self-belief, confidence, and inner strength. The book offers practical motivation and inspirational guidance to help readers overcome fear, develop a positive mindset, and achieve success in personal and professional life.

title: The Power of Your Subconscious Mind: Original Classic Edition (Premium Paperback)
description: The Power of Your Subconscious Mind by Dr. Joseph Murphy is a classic self-help book that explores how the subconscious influences behavior, habits, and success. The book provides practical techniques to reprogram the subconscious mind to achieve confidence, wealth, health, and happiness.

title: Atomic Habits: The Life-Changing Million Copy Bestseller (Paperback)
description: Atomic Habits by James Clear reveals a proven framework for building good habits and breaking bad ones. The book focuses on making small, incremental changes that compound into remarkable results, backed by behavioral science and real-life examples.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad: What the Rich Teach Their Kids About Money That the Poor and Middle Class Do Not! (Paperback)
description: Rich Dad Poor Dad by Robert T. Kiyosaki is a personal finance classic that challenges traditional beliefs about money, jobs, and investing. Through contrasting lessons from two father figures, the book teaches the importance of financial education, assets vs liabilities, entrepreneurship, and building wealth through smart financial decisions.

title: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People: Updated Edition (Paperback)
description: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People by Stephen R. Covey is a landmark self-help and leadership book that presents a principle-centered approach to personal and professional effectiveness. The updated edition includes modern insights while preserving the timeless habits that help individuals achieve success, integrity, and balance.

title: How to Win Friends and Influence People: Original Classic Edition (Premium Paperback)
description: How to Win Friends and Influence People by Dale Carnegie is a timeless self-help classic that teaches effective communication, leadership, and relationship-building skills. Through practical principles and real-life examples, the book shows how to win people over, influence others positively, and build lasting personal and professional relationships.

title: How to Stop Worrying and Start Living: Original Edition (Premium Paperback)
description: How to Stop Worrying and Start Living by Dale Carnegie is a classic self-help book that offers practical techniques to overcome worry, reduce stress, and live a calmer, more productive life. The book provides proven methods to break the habit of worrying and focus on positive, actionable living.
